text:
🚨🐾 STARS, STRIPES & STRUTS — MEGA PACK WALK! 🇺🇸🐶 RSVP LINK : https://luma.com/l6yph2wh

DTLA’s biggest dog community is taking over Downtown Los Angeles on Saturday, July 11 for an unforgettable morning of dogs, community, training, local vendors, goodie bags, and plenty of pack energy!

⏰ Check-in: 8:30–8:55 AM
🐕 Walk begins promptly at 9:00 AM
🎉 Post-party immediately after the walk
🥯 Free bagels from our host, @boichikbagels
🛍️ Local vendors, community connections and more!

This event proudly benefits @bigdogenergy_la and the incredible work they do supporting at-risk shelter dogs. 💛

A huge thank-you to everyone helping bring this event to life:

Hosted by:
🥯 @boichikbagels

Community Partners:
🏙️ @historiccore
💜 @downtown_la
🐶 @littlelionsocialla

Goodie Bag Sponsors and vendors:
🐾 @something.good.treats
🐾 @wildnfreshtreats
🐾 @baileyscbd
🐾 @bibimpawsofficial
🐾 @wayofwoof

Presented by:
@fitpalslosangeles
DTLA Dog Walking Club

Come ready to walk, train, connect and build community with one of the most exciting dog communities in Los Angeles!

⚠️ RSVP and signed waiver required
⚠️ No walk-ins
⚠️ No retractable leashes
💧 Bring water for you and your pup

Let’s fill DTLA with paws, purpose and positive pack energy! 🇺🇸🐾
